title: Autonomous loop quality verdict refresh after ticket seeding
problem: Ticket-333 emits quality-driven draft improvement tickets but research_quality_verdict is computed before seeding, so weak_ticket_generation remains PARTIAL even after drafts are persisted.
acceptance_criteria: After quality-driven ticket seeding, loop report research_quality_verdict reflects emitted drafts (weak_ticket_generation score improves when ticket_ids non-empty).
Fixture autonomous loop can reach GO or documented PARTIAL with honest rationale.
